title: Crispy Bacon and Crunchy Vegetable Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy Chinese-inspired stir fry with crispy bacon and crunchy vegetables. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cook the bacon in a pan over medium heat until crispy, then set aside.
Add the crunchy and Japanese ingredients to the pan and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add the crumble and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes, until the greens are wilted.
Return the cooked bacon to the pan and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
